state_rules: ready means the required local evidence is present and consistent with the current mock envelope
needs_review means no live write is needed, but PM confirmation or local evidence cleanup is still required
blocked means the item cannot be treated as reusable packet context
live_write_authority must stay blocked unless the exact future admission phrase is current instruction
minimum_classification_criteria: project_source_identity_context requires matching project_id, candidate_id, and source_fingerprint across mock envelope and export snapshot
actuals_evidence_review requires actuals/labor preview fields, evidence bundle fields, and correction linkage fields when needed
customer_preview_review requires recipient review, delivery-channel review, preview artifact references, and delivery-block posture
route_and_mock_envelope_continuity requires identical chosen route, action type, and idempotency key across preview and export
readback_and_execution_gate_context requires visible designed readback posture and exact future admission phrase in current packet context
live_write_authority remains blocked when the exact future admission phrase is absent from current instruction
required_local_checkpoint_proof: Explicit reason for each non-ready item
not_admitted: Browser controls that submit a request
Any runtime route call or network request
Any record creation or replay proof
